project_type: Python Streamlit app - AI text humanization pipeline
build_system: pip with requirements.txt, no Makefile or Docker
test_command: python -c "from humanizer import HumanizationPipeline; print('Import OK')"
verification_instructions: 1. pip install -r requirements.txt  2. python -c to verify imports  3. streamlit run app.py --server.headless true (verify no crash on startup)
setup_instructions: pip install -r requirements.txt && python -m spacy download en_core_web_sm && python -c "import nltk; nltk.download('wordnet'); nltk.download('omw-1.4')"
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access available. Uses freemodel.dev API (OpenAI-compatible) for LLM calls.
contribution_requirements: Keep existing pipeline working as-is. App must remain runnable with streamlit run app.py. All additions are new modules or extensions to existing ones.
key_patterns: Each pipeline stage is a class with __init__(aggression, seed) and process(text) method. Config is centralized in config.py. Pipeline orchestrator in pipeline.py chains stages. app.py is a single-file Streamlit app with side-by-side layout. Streaming via generator pattern (process_stream yields chunks). Progress callback pattern for UI updates.
directory_structure: Root: app.py (Streamlit UI), requirements.txt, README.md. humanizer/: __init__.py, config.py (all settings/constants), pipeline.py (orchestrator), text_analysis.py (metrics), stage_structural.py, stage_lexical.py, stage_llm_rewrite.py, stage_perplexity.py, stage_postprocess.py
